{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42300", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-288", "name": "Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel"}], "description": "### Impact
The `SessionMiddleware` accepts a client-supplied `X-Admin-Token` HTTP request header and uses its raw string value as the authenticated `userID` when no Kratos session cookie is present. An unauthenticated attacker who knows or can guess a target user's Kratos identity UUID can issue requests as that user. Where the target user is an organisation `admin` or `owner`, this gives the attacker full control over that organisation's DevGuard resources.

### Patches
The release v1.2.2 patches this issue. Update your DevGuard API Instances to this version.

### Workarounds
Configure a reverse proxy to strip the `X-Admin-Token` header before sending requests to the DevGuard API.

### Resources
Fixed commit: https://github.com/l3montree-dev/devguard/commit/6f38310bf93b2a63df3055038f4da82b1f4e6d9a", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00257, "percentile": 0.16822}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2g9v-7mr5-fgjg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-05T20:58:27Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2g9v-7mr5-fgjg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2g9v-7mr5-fgjg"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42300"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-12T18:17:24Z", "published_at": "2026-05-05T20:58:27Z", "references": ["https://github.com/l3montree-dev/devguard/security/advisories/GHSA-2g9v-7mr5-fgjg", "https://github.com/l3montree-dev/devguard/commit/6f38310bf93b2a63df3055038f4da82b1f4e6d9a", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42300", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2g9v-7mr5-fgjg"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/l3montree-dev/devguard/security-advisories/GHSA-2g9v-7mr5-fgjg", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/l3montree-dev/devguard", "summary": "DevGuard has an unauthenticated identity assertion via `X-Admin-Token` header", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T16:26:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2g9v-7mr5-fgjg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.2.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/l3montree-dev/devguard"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.2.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: DevGuard has an unauthenticated identity assertion via `X-Admin-Token` header
